---
title: "Line Plot Widget"
---

## Overview

Developer documentation for `LinePlotWidget`, which displays line plots for visualizing time series data.

## Source Location

`src/WhiskerToolbox/Plots/LinePlotWidget/`

## Architecture

*TODO: Document widget architecture, state management, and key classes.*

## Key Classes

- `LinePlotWidget` — Main widget class

## See Also

- [Plot Widget Guide](../plot_widget_guide.md)
